title: alnus serrulata var. vulgaris
intro: Alnus serrulata var. vulgaris, also known as the American green alder or green alder, is a variety of deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds like salicin and flavonoids. The health benefits of Alnus serrulata var. vulgaris include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing. Alnus serrulata var. vulgaris can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, often used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
